assets_and_content.icon_prompt: game icon, skill, shadow step, dark silhouette of a rogue vanishing into black mist, sharp dagger silhouette, purple-black aura, minimal flat design, no motion
assets_and_content.rich_text_desc: 瞬间位移至目标身后，造成 <color=#2A2A4A>35</color> 点基础伤害并附加 <color=#2A2A4A>8.0</color> 米位移距离的短暂减速效果。冷却时间 <color=#2A2A4A>12.0</color> 秒。
